target: 2. Shadow Mio's Aim
This video on my smartphone, I recorded it last night, but...
At this time, I was taking a bath. So this isn't me...
Eh...
No, Shinpei-kun. This kind of joke is no good.
Bringing out a kitchen knife makes it not a joke anymore, you know? And you even dragged Mio-chan into it.
Ah, um…
It's in pretty bad taste. You shouldn't tease adults with stuff like this.
(So he really didn't believe me, huh...)
Shin-chan…
(But regardless of this guy, I want to borrow the power of the police somehow...)
Is that all you needed? Well then, I'm gonna――
U-Um! About the report from last night...!
Ah, that prank. Don't do things like that from now on.
Around 9 PM last night... Weren't you planning to pass by Kofune?
It's true that yesterday, if it wasn't for that report, I was supposed to pass by Kofune on my patrol around 9 PM, but...
Just as I thought...
How do you know something like that, Shinpei-kun?
Last night... If I hadn't made that report then...
You might have been killed by this fake Mio, Totsumura-san!
Huuuuh!!??
W-Wait, Shin-chan! Wasn't the Shadow coming to target me!?
A shadow with your exact appearance comes to kill you... That's what 'Shadow Sickness' is about, right!?
Calm down, Mio. It's strictly a possibility, but it's not impossible...
That Shadow was clearly trying to kill you. It even brought out a kitchen knife.
If Totsumura-san had run into a Shadow like that... Do you think he would have gotten away safely?
(Thinking based on my previous memories... It's almost certain that Totsumura-san would have been killed if I hadn't done anything.)
(But I can't tell them that now. That really would make them think it's a bad joke.)
(Dying and coming back to life...)
(It's probably better to keep quiet about that phenomenon for now.)
Wait, wait! 'Shadow Sickness'... you mean that!?
The one where those who see their shadow die, that...
Yes. It wasn't just a superstition, it was real.
This video is the proof!
This is the proof...
(I guess he still won't believe me...)
Well, you know. Whether I believe it or not doesn't matter right now.
Eh?
Tell me a little more in detail.
Listening to the kids' stories is also an important job for a hero of justice, right.
Phew... anyway, I understand what you guys are trying to say.
There's a fake Mio-chan on this island... And that thing is dangerous, right?
If that story is true, it wouldn't be strange for anyone to be attacked anytime, anywhere...
...Yeah, I understand perfectly!
Um, do you believe...
I believe you, I believe you. It'd be impossible to doubt you after seeing how serious you two look.
Tetsu-san!
Leave it to me! I'll solve this in a flash!
(Honestly, he's a bit... No, he's pretty unreliable, but...)
(But I'm grateful he believed us, and having the police on our side is reassuring.)
Oh yeah, you heard what I said earlier, right? Backup detectives from the mainland are coming on the afternoon ferry. I'll try consulting with them first.
Y-Yes, please do! Thank goodness, Shin-chan.
Yeah...
But, about Mio-chan's Shadow... If it was targeting Mio-chan, why didn't it just break into the house right away?
Ah... that's probably so it wouldn't stand out weirdly――
Hold on a second!
Is something wrong?
This is just a 'what if', but the Shadow's real target... could it have actually been me?
That's why it didn't go into Kofune, and was ambushing me on the road――
Because I'm a hero of justice and an excellent local cop――
Yeah, that's definitely it! It has to be!
...Is that so?
A-Ahahaha...
(I highly doubt that's the case, but...)
